nodes.name: 外来捕食者
nodes.summary: 岛屿鸟类常受猫、鼬和鼠等外来种影响。

nodes.name: 气候变化
nodes.summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。

nodes.name: 胡安·費爾南德斯群島
nodes.summary: 胡安·費爾南德斯群島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括黑颈天鹅、Kermadec petrel、Stejneger's petrel等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 智利
nodes.summary: 智利是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联200种鸟类，包括北山䳍、南山䳍、凤头䳍等200种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: Stejneger's petrel
nodes.summary: Stejneger's petrel（Stejneger's petrel，学名 Pterodroma longirostris），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要分布于胡安·費爾南德斯群島、智利，主要威胁包括外来捕食者、气候变化。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It occurs in the Pacific Ocean, nesting in the Cerro de Los Inocentes mountain of the Juan Fernández Islands off Chile. Outside the breeding season Stejneger's petrel migrates to the waters of the north-west Pacific off Japan

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It occurs in the Pacific Ocean, nesting in the Cerro de Los Inocentes mountain of the Juan Fernández Islands off Chile. Outside the breeding season Stejneger's petrel migrates to the waters of the north-west Pacific off Japan

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Stejneger's petrel is classified as Vulnerable by the International Union for Conservation of Nature. The population is thought to have declined, with the main threat being predation by introduced predators

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: They are also likely to be threatened by climate change
